caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of "Rural Community Food System," specifically focusing on the relationship between retailers willing to source local products and product cost/price dynamics. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking about the content displayed on the left. The main slide discusses how retailers who are willing to source locally increase the availability of locally sourced products, which can lead to lower product costs and higher likelihoods of local consumption. This, in turn, supports those retailers. The slide includes a diagram with arrows indicating the flow of this reinforcing cycle, showing how increased availability leads to lower costs and higher consumption, which then further supports local sourcing. The overall theme emphasizes the importance of local sourcing in rural communities and its positive economic impacts.
